// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;

[Flags]
internal enum MyEnumFormat : byte
{
    None = 0,
    Name = 1,
    Value = 2,
    DisplayName = 4,
    Description = 8,
    Default = Name | Value
}
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;

internal static partial class Enums
{
    internal static partial class MyEnum
    {
        public const int MemberCount = 6;
        public const bool IsFlagEnum = false;

        public static string[] GetMemberNames() => _names ??= new string[] {
                "Keep",
                "OmitUnderlying",
                "OmitDisplay",
                "OmitIsDefined",
                "OmitString"
            };

        public static global::MyEnum[] GetMemberValues() => _values ??= new global::MyEnum[] {
                global::MyEnum.Keep,
                global::MyEnum.OmitNameParse,
                global::MyEnum.OmitUnderlying,
                global::MyEnum.OmitDisplay,
                global::MyEnum.OmitIsDefined,
                global::MyEnum.OmitString
            };

        public static Int32[] GetUnderlyingValues() => _underlyingValues ??= new Int32[] {
                0,
                2,
                4,
                5,
                6
            };

        public static bool TryParse(string value, out global::MyEnum result, MyEnumFormat format = MyEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if ((format & MyEnumFormat.Name) == MyEnumFormat.Name)
            {
                if (value.Equals("Keep", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.Keep;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("OmitUnderlying", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.OmitUnderlying;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("OmitDisplay", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.OmitDisplay;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("OmitIsDefined", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.OmitIsDefined;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("OmitString", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.OmitString;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & MyEnumFormat.Value) == MyEnumFormat.Value)
            {
                if (value.Equals("0", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.Keep;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("3", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.OmitUnderlying;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("4", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.OmitDisplay;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("5", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.OmitIsDefined;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("6", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.OmitString;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & MyEnumFormat.DisplayName) == MyEnumFormat.DisplayName)
            {


                if (value.Equals("Disp", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.OmitDisplay;
                    return true;
                }


            }
            if ((format & MyEnumFormat.Description) == MyEnumFormat.Description)
            {


                if (value.Equals("Desc", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.OmitDisplay;
                    return true;
                }


            }
            result = default;
            return false;
        }

#if NETSTANDARD2_1_OR_GREATER || NETCOREAPP3_1_OR_GREATER
        public static bool TryParse(ReadOnlySpan<char> value, out global::MyEnum result, MyEnumFormat format = MyEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if ((format & MyEnumFormat.Name) == MyEnumFormat.Name)
            {
                if (value.Equals("Keep", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.Keep;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("OmitUnderlying", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.OmitUnderlying;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("OmitDisplay", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.OmitDisplay;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("OmitIsDefined", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.OmitIsDefined;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("OmitString", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.OmitString;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & MyEnumFormat.Value) == MyEnumFormat.Value)
            {
                if (value.Equals("0", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.Keep;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("3", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.OmitUnderlying;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("4", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.OmitDisplay;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("5", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.OmitIsDefined;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("6", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.OmitString;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & MyEnumFormat.DisplayName) == MyEnumFormat.DisplayName)
            {


                if (value.Equals("Disp", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.OmitDisplay;
                    return true;
                }


            }
            if ((format & MyEnumFormat.Description) == MyEnumFormat.Description)
            {


                if (value.Equals("Desc", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::MyEnum.OmitDisplay;
                    return true;
                }


            }
            result = default;
            return false;
        }

        public static global::MyEnum Parse(ReadOnlySpan<char> value, MyEnumFormat format = MyEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if (!TryParse(value, out global::MyEnum result, format, comparison))
                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value.ToString()}");

            return result;
        }
#endif

        public static global::MyEnum Parse(string value, MyEnumFormat format = MyEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if (!TryParse(value, out global::MyEnum result, format, comparison))
                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

            return result;
        }

        public static bool IsDefined(global::MyEnum input)
        {
            _isDefinedValues ??= new Int32[] {
                0,
                2,
                3,
                4,
                6
            };
            for (int i = 0; i < _isDefinedValues.Length; i++)
            {
                if (_isDefinedValues[i] == (Int32)input)
                    return true;
            }

            return false;
        }

        public static (global::MyEnum, string)[] GetDisplayNames() => Array.Empty<(global::MyEnum, string)>();

        public static (global::MyEnum, string)[] GetDescriptions() => Array.Empty<(global::MyEnum, string)>();

        private static string[]? _names;
        private static global::MyEnum[]? _values;
        private static Int32[]? _underlyingValues;
        private static Int32[]? _isDefinedValues;

    }
}
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis;

internal static partial class MyEnumExtensions
{
    public static string GetString(this global::MyEnum value) => value switch
    {
        global::MyEnum.Keep => "Keep",
        global::MyEnum.OmitAll => string.Empty,
            global::MyEnum.OmitNameParse => "OmitNameParse",
        global::MyEnum.OmitUnderlying => "OmitUnderlying",
        global::MyEnum.OmitDisplay => "OmitDisplay",
        global::MyEnum.OmitIsDefined => "OmitIsDefined",
        global::MyEnum.OmitString => string.Empty,
        _ => value.ToString()
    };

    public static bool TryGetUnderlyingValue(this global::MyEnum value, out Int32 underlyingValue)
    {
        switch (value)
        {
            case global::MyEnum.Keep:
                underlyingValue = 0;
                return true;
            case global::MyEnum.OmitNameParse:
                underlyingValue = 2;
                return true;
            case global::MyEnum.OmitUnderlying:
                underlyingValue = 3;
                return true;
            case global::MyEnum.OmitDisplay:
                underlyingValue = 4;
                return true;
            case global::MyEnum.OmitIsDefined:
                underlyingValue = 5;
                return true;
            case global::MyEnum.OmitString:
                underlyingValue = 6;
                return true;
        }
        underlyingValue = default;
        return false;
    }

    public static Int32 GetUnderlyingValue(this global::MyEnum value)
    {
        if (!TryGetUnderlyingValue(value, out Int32 underlyingValue))
            throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

        return underlyingValue;
    }

    public static bool TryGetDisplayName(this global::MyEnum value,
#if NETSTANDARD2_1_OR_GREATER || NETCOREAPP3_1_OR_GREATER
[NotNullWhen(true)]
#endif
out string? displayName)
    {
        
        displayName = null;
        return false;
    }

    public static string GetDisplayName(this global::MyEnum value)
    {
        if (!TryGetDisplayName(value, out string? displayName))
            throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

        return displayName!;
    }

    public static bool TryGetDescription(this global::MyEnum value,
#if NETSTANDARD2_1_OR_GREATER || NETCOREAPP3_1_OR_GREATER
[NotNullWhen(true)]
#endif
out string? description)
    {
        
        description = null;
        return false;
    }

    public static string GetDescription(this global::MyEnum value)
    {
        if (!TryGetDescription(value, out string? description))
            throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

        return description!;
    }
}
